strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and real-time systems
Proven track record of building and open-sourcing AI-adjacent platforms (e.g., GISCollective, MCP tooling)
Strong technical leadership through workshops, code kata, and cross-team knowledge sharing
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
No explicit evidence of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy at director-level scale
Limited documentation of direct customer advisory or strategic partnership experience in AI/cloud domains
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep engineering breadth, open-source innovation, and leadership in tooling and infrastructure, aligning with the role’s need for technical vision and builder fluency; however, the critical discrepancy in name and lack of clear AI product or strategic customer advisory experience raise substantial concerns about authenticity and role fit.
